text: Pulled a fresh random Pixal from the remaining on-chain supply straight into the studio. Which survivor speaks to you today? The early mints are getting rare... and the community is getting stronger.

text: POV: You finally located the legendary KitKat stash hidden deep in the Pixel Journey lore... but the real prize was the community of Pixal holders we found along the way. Some legends are better shared.

text: PIXAL EYES ONLY. Some things are meant only for those who hold the vision. If you know, you know. The rarest survivors don’t need validation — they just exist on-chain.
